queries.question: Which tools do all traffic engineers equally use?
queries.sql: SELECT Tools.tool_name  from Traffic_Engineers_Tools join Tools on Traffic_Engineers_Tools.tool_id = Tools.tool_id join Traffic_Engineers on Traffic_Engineers_Tools.engineer_id = Traffic_Engineers.id   GROUP BY Traffic_Engineers_Tools.tool_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Traffic_Engineers_Tools.engineer_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Traffic_Engineers)

queries.question: List the type of tools we have for each traffic engineer.
queries.sql: SELECT Tools.type  from Traffic_Engineers_Tools join Tools on Traffic_Engineers_Tools.tool_id = Tools.tool_id join Traffic_Engineers on Traffic_Engineers_Tools.engineer_id = Traffic_Engineers.id   GROUP BY Traffic_Engineers_Tools.tool_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Traffic_Engineers_Tools.engineer_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Traffic_Engineers)

queries.question: List the type of tools we have for each traffic engineer.
queries.sql: select traffic_engineers.name , tools.type from Traffic_Engineers_Tools join Tools on Traffic_Engineers_Tools.tool_id = Tools.tool_id join Traffic_Engineers on Traffic_Engineers_Tools.engineer_id = Traffic_Engineers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?traffic_engineers_tools a :Traffic_Engineers_Tools .
  ?tools a :Tools .
  ?traffic_engineers_tools p:hasTools ?tools .
  ?traffic_engineers a :Traffic_Engineers .
  ?traffic_engineers_tools p:hasTraffic_Engineers ?traffic_engineers .
  ?traffic_engineers p:name ?name .
  ?tools p:type ?type .
}

queries.question: Give me the tools that all traffic engineers use.
queries.sql: select traffic_engineers.name , tools.tool_name from Traffic_Engineers_Tools join Tools on Traffic_Engineers_Tools.tool_id = Tools.tool_id join Traffic_Engineers on Traffic_Engineers_Tools.engineer_id = Traffic_Engineers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?tool_name WHERE {
  ?traffic_engineers_tools a :Traffic_Engineers_Tools .
  ?tools a :Tools .
  ?traffic_engineers_tools p:hasTools ?tools .
  ?traffic_engineers a :Traffic_Engineers .
  ?traffic_engineers_tools p:hasTraffic_Engineers ?traffic_engineers .
  ?traffic_engineers p:name ?name .
  ?tools p:name ?tool_name .
}

queries.question: Give me the tool types and names that are common to all engineers
queries.sql: SELECT Tools.tool_name, Tools.type  from Traffic_Engineers_Tools join Tools on Traffic_Engineers_Tools.tool_id = Tools.tool_id join Traffic_Engineers on Traffic_Engineers_Tools.engineer_id = Traffic_Engineers.id   GROUP BY Traffic_Engineers_Tools.tool_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Traffic_Engineers_Tools.engineer_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Traffic_Engineers)

queries.question: For all engineers, please provide me with the names and types of tools they use.
queries.sql: select traffic_engineers.name , tools.tool_name , tools.type from Traffic_Engineers_Tools join Tools on Traffic_Engineers_Tools.tool_id = Tools.tool_id join Traffic_Engineers on Traffic_Engineers_Tools.engineer_id = Traffic_Engineers.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?tool_name ?type WHERE {
  ?traffic_engineers_tools a :Traffic_Engineers_Tools .
  ?tools a :Tools .
  ?traffic_engineers_tools p:hasTools ?tools .
  ?traffic_engineers a :Traffic_Engineers .
  ?traffic_engineers_tools p:hasTraffic_Engineers ?traffic_engineers .
  ?traffic_engineers p:name ?name .
  ?tools p:name ?tool_name .
  ?tools p:type ?type .
}
